overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a muddy Old West town street. The character passes wooden storefronts including a Sheriff's office and Drug store, encounters pedestrians and horse-drawn wagons, and approaches a Doctor's office. The scene features detailed wooden architecture, muddy ground with train tracks, and warm afternoon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden sidewalk transitioning to muddy main street

events.description: character briefly raises right arm in greeting or acknowledgment toward approaching pedestrian
pedestrian in blue coat and hat passes close to camera, temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy street beside wooden storefronts, navigating around the stationary green stagecoach

notable_agents.action: driver sitting atop the green stagecoach holding reins
pedestrian in blue coat and hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: two-story weathered wooden building with covered porch, stairs, and balcony
dark green enclosed horse-drawn carriage with large spoked wheels and driver in blue coat
two-story wooden building with SHERIFF sign painted on the roof facade
weathered white wooden building with large DRUGS lettering on the upper floor
raised wooden plank walkway running along the front of the porch building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a muddy Western town street. The character walks past a wooden building with a covered porch on the left and a green stagecoach on the right. A pedestrian approaches from the distance, and the character raises an arm in greeting as they pass each other. The Sheriff's building is visible in the background, and the muddy ground shows train tracks running down the center of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy main street with embedded train tracks

events.description: horse-drawn freight wagon pulled by two horses moves from left to right across the street
rider on brown horse approaches from behind on the left, overtaking the character

agents.ego_description: continuing down the muddy street, navigating around moving wagons and horses while passing wooden storefronts

notable_agents.action: large wooden freight wagon with driver moving along the street
cowboy rider on brown horse moving past the character

entered.detail: tall wooden telegraph pole with multiple crossbars and wires extending across the street
large open wooden wagon with high sides, pulled by two brown horses
wooden building with prominent second-floor balcony and wooden railings

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the open muddy street with full sky visibility. Wooden utility poles line the left side while the Drugs store recedes into the distance on the right. A large freight wagon passes by on the left, followed by a cowboy on horseback. The two-story saloon with its wooden balcony becomes prominent on the right side as the character continues forward along the train tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the doctor's office at the end of the street

events.description: character slows walking pace and turns slightly right toward the Doctor's office entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the Doctor's office, walking up the wooden steps to the covered porch entrance

notable_agents.action: man in vest standing on the Doctor's office porch with arms crossed

entered.detail: two-story weathered wooden building with DOCTOR sign, and TONICS and POWDER signs on the porch
old gray wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked beside the Doctor's office

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the street where the Doctor's office stands prominently. The two-story saloon is now closer on the right, and a weathered wagon is parked beside it. The Doctor's office features a covered porch with steps and signage for TONICS and POWDER. A man stands on the porch as the character slows down and walks up the steps to the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement down a muddy Western town street that transitions from a bustling thoroughfare into a focused approach toward a local clinic. It begins as the character walks past a covered porch and a green stagecoach, raising an arm in greeting to a passing pedestrian while train tracks cut through the mud toward a distant Sheriff's office. As the character advances, the scene opens up under a clear sky, with the Drug store receding on the right and a large freight wagon and horseback rider passing on the left. The perspective then shifts toward a prominent two-story saloon with a wooden balcony before turning toward the end of the street. Finally, the camera closes in on the Doctor's office, passing a weathered wagon to reach the covered porch and its signage for tonics and powder as the character ascends the steps.
